title: Vibrant Roasted Uruguayan Kielbasa Wrap
description: A tangy and light Uruguayan dish featuring kielbasa, perfect for a brunch mood, wrapped in a low-carb corn husk wrap.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced onion and diced red bell pepper with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the onion and bell pepper mixture on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly browned.
While the vegetables are roasting, slice the Uruguayan kielbasa into 1/2 inch thick rounds.
In a large skillet, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium-high heat and cook the kielbasa slices for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are browned and crispy.
Warm the corn husks by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.

Assemble the wraps by spreading a tablespoon of chimichurri sauce on each corn husk, followed by a few slices of the roasted kielbasa, some of the roasted onion and bell pepper, and a sprinkle of minced garlic.
Serve the wraps immediately and enjoy.
Garnish with additional chimichurri sauce and roasted vegetables, if desired.
